assumptions: The TypingAnimation component exists and has a speed/delay prop
Current speed is set to approximately 60-100ms per character
The fix involves changing the speed to 20-25ms per character
complexity_reasoning: Scope: 5 (single component, 1-2 files). Risk: 3 (UI animation only, no data/sensitive changes). Novelty: 3 (straightforward value change). Cross-domain: 0 (single frontend domain). Ambiguity: 2 (clear intent - change delay from 60-100ms to 20-25ms). Dependencies: 2 (self-contained component). Total: 15 (Simple tier)

input_quality.reasoning: Input contains clear title, environment, preconditions, steps to reproduce, expected result (20-25ms), actual result (60-100ms), and reproducibility. Promoted spec.md with extracted requirements.
